notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG Amihud-illiquidity basket from approved card YIYI-ALIQ-2025_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; at the first tradable bar of every broker month, calculate the prior-12-completed-month mean of daily absolute log return divided by same-day MT5 tick volume, buy the higher-ALIq leg, short the lower-ALIq leg, and evaluate the package rather than standalone legs. Tick volume is an activity proxy, not source exchange dollar volume, and Q02 is a strict proxy and two-CFD falsification.
